ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the economic data */,
  "consumer_spending" INTEGER /* Total consumer spending */,
  "government_spending" INTEGER /* Total government spending */,
  "investment" INTEGER /* Total investment */,
  "exports" INTEGER /* Total exports */,
  "imports" INTEGER /* Total imports */,
  "gdp" INTEGER /* Gross Domestic Product (GDP) */,
  "inflation_rate" REAL /* Inflation rate for the year */,
  "unemployment_rate" REAL /* Unemployment rate for the year */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population for the year */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for this entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Name of the year */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year is the current year */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the year's data is active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user account is active */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used for access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "is_reliable" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data source is considered reliable */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the data source information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality log */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year being checked */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date of the data quality check */,
  "check_result" INTEGER /* Result of the data quality check (true for passed, false for failed) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the check */,
  "checked_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the data quality check */,
  "check_method" TEXT /* Method used for the data quality check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_checked_by FOREIGN KEY ("checked_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_logs_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data version */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year the data version belongs to */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the data */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date the version was created */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes in this version */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data version (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the data version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_versions_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data version the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum of the file to ensure data integrity */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XLSX) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES data_versions ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the report */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the report was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_logs_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_visualizations" (
  "viz_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "viz_name" TEXT /* Name of the visualization */,
  "viz_description" TEXT /* Description of the visualization */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the visualization */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date the visualization was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the visualization */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published, archived) */,
  "approved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who approved the visualization */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date the visualization was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("viz_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_approved_by FOREIGN KEY ("approved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_visualizations_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
